title: serratula lucida
intro: Serratula lucida, also known as the shining saw-wort or shining milk thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Serratula lucida include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues like constipation and diarrhea. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
